failedAssertions.reason: Registration auto-creates profile with username as name, so new users never see the onboarding ProfileForm with 'Begin Journey' button. After registration, user is redirected directly to home page with profile already existing.
failedAssertions.observedBehavior: POST /api/auth/register -> 201 automatically creates profile with name=username. User redirected to home page instead of onboarding form.
failedAssertions.expectedBehavior: New user sees ProfileForm with Name input and 'Begin Journey' button after registration.
failedAssertions.quickFix: If onboarding experience is required, modify backend/routes/auth.ts to not auto-create profile during registration. If auto-create is intentional, update VAL-ONBOARD-001 assertion to match actual behavior.

frictions.description: agent-browser fill command does not reliably clear existing value before filling
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval with JavaScript to clear input fields before testing empty validation

blockers.description: Registration flow (backend/routes/auth.ts) auto-creates profile using profileService.createProfileForUser(user.id, username.trim()) - this creates a profile with name=username
blockers.quickFix: Determine if onboarding experience is needed or if auto-create is intentional design
